list.name: Changes
list.comment:
The BIG one - Refactored the gigantic MAMMOTH of a monolithic module into multiple submodules for project health.
# Breaking Changes
Package Renames: - com.tonic.utill -> com.tonic.util - com.tonic.parser.attribute.anotation -> com.tonic.parser.attribute.annotation
Class Relocations: - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.Visitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.Visitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractClassVisitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.AbstractClassVisitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractMethodVisitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.AbstractMethodVisitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractBlockVisitor -> com.tonic.analysis.ssa.visitor.AbstractBlockVisitor
Method Relocations: - ClassFile.generateGetter(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.generateGetter(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.generateSetter(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.generateSetter(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.setFieldInitialValue(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.setFieldInitialValue(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.computeFrames(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.computeFrames(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.createNewMethod(boolean addDefaultBody, ...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.createMethodWithBody(classFile, ...) - ClassPool.createNewClass(...) (auto ctor/clinit) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.createClass(pool, ...) (now bare without it) - CodeAttribute.prettyPrintCode([opts]) -> com.tonic.analysis.CodePrinter.prettyPrintCode(codeAttr[, opts]) - CodeWriter.toSSA()/fromSSA(ir)/optimizeSSA() -> com.tonic.analysis.ssa.SSABridge.toSSA(cw)/fromSSA(cw, ir)/optimizeSSA(cw) - BootstrapMethodInfo.isStringConcat/isLambda/isRecord/isSwitch(...) + the LAMBDA_METAFACTORY/STRING_CONCAT_FACTORY/OBJECT_METHODS/SWITCH_BOOTSTRAPS constants -> com.tonic.analysis.BootstrapFamilies.*

task.summary: Default task
- RegisterAllocator.java — interference-guarded phi coalescing (intervalByValue map + interferes() + guard in buildPhiCoalescingMap).
- Fix loop-variable miscompilation, support multi-var declarations, tidy codegen

- Codegen: emit single-use literal constants inline at their use site (iconst/ldc) instead of materializing them to a local slot and reloading. Matches javac, shrinks bytecode, and removes the spurious slot variables that round-tripped as `boolean localN = true`.
- Decompiler: attribute a loop-header phi to its own home slot rather than the first store-use of its result, so a body copy like `a = b`no longer conflates the two variables or drops the body store.

Keep single-use values on the stack; drop dead field read on inc/dec - Codegen: fix isSimpleOperand so a single-use value feeding a comparison (e.g. i*i in i*i <= n) stays stack-resident instead of spilling to a scratch slot the decompiler then mangled. - Lowering: dispatch inc/dec before lowerUnary's eager operand lowering so a field increment reads the field once, not twice.
- don't un-materialize a value already emitted as an array-initializer declaration; reference the temp instead.

Java 21 pattern switch: decompile + recompile - Decompile: reconstruct type-pattern, record-deconstruction, and guarded (when) arms from typeSwitch. Strip synthetic MatchException handlers, force the $pc$ dispatch form for guard restart loops, fold pass/failstates. - Recompile: parse pattern/guard/deconstruction case labels and lower them to a SwitchBootstraps.typeSwitch indy + dispatch (restart loop for guards,accessor decls for deconstruction). Emit case-type Class bootstrap args. - Also fixes: BinaryOp/UnaryOp results feeding a declared merge phi were dropped; nested-class names now render Outer.Inner not Outer$Inner.
- Bytecode editor: branch widening, indy graft, clone alignment
- Fixed: standard UTF-8 was used for CONSTANT_Utf8 instead of JVMS modified UTF-8

- CodeWriter: handle-keyed insertBefore/insertAfter/removeInstruction/replaceInstruction/replaceBody + cloneRange/cloneRangeWithTargets, all via a relink pass (branch/switch retarget, branch widening, exception table, frame regen). New ConstPoolRemapper + MethodGrafter for cross-pool method grafting (incl. invokedynamic bootstraps); ClassFile.redirectOwner and stripStackMapTables. Local-var clones use the narrowest encoding.
- Fix CONSTANT_Utf8 to use JVMS modified UTF-8 (read + write) and FrameGenerator goto_w target computation.

Detached snippet assembly + cloned-range inlining primitives - CodeBuilder.detached()/assemble() produces a spliceable ClonedRange: invokedynamic (bootstrap added to the target's BootstrapMethods), try/catch, and branches into the host via externalLabel/bindLabel or a tail continuation label. - CodeWriter: exception-table relink is now identity-based (fixes host table corruption when a spliced block's offsets collide on insert); max_stack is computed over the CFG via FrameGenerator (computeMaxStack, applied in relink + write) so handler/loop peaks no longer under-count; cloneRangeWithTargets carries out-of-range branch targets by identity (same-method, guarded loud against cross-method misuse); ClonedRange.redirectReturns() turns cloned returns into continuation exits and insertChainBefore folds several bodies without the skip hazard. - ClassFile.addBootstrapMethod/getBootstrapMethodsAttribute (ConstPoolRemapper now delegates to them). New tests: CodeBuilderSnippetTest, CodeBuilderExternalBranchTest, MaxStackTest, ClonedRangeExitsTest.

Complete class-ref redirect, list view, lookups, InvokeInsn
redirectClassReferences(ConstPool/ClassFile) canonicalizes every reference to a class — bare CONSTANT_Class operands (new/checkcast/instanceof/anewarray), catch_type, member-ref owners, indy bootstrap classes, and L<name>; tokens in descriptors — so no live constant names the old class after a relocate/merge.
redirectOwner now delegates to it (was member-ref-only; left dangling operand refs that VerifyError'd on use). Generic Signature attrs stay out of scope (Renamer's job). Drops the now-dead memberRef{,Set}ClassIndex helpers.
Added: - CodeWriter.getInstructionList() — offset-ordered, identity-indexed snapshot - ClassFile.getMethod(name[, desc]) / getMethods(name) / getConstructors() / getStaticInitializer() / getField(name) / getInterfaceNames() - InvokeInsn interface implemented by the four owner-bearing invokes (not invokedynamic), so call sites can extract the callee uniformly
- constant guard for force inlining

Enrich bytecode disassembly via single decoder + verbose options - CodePrinter now parses via InstructionFactory + renders via InstructionRenderer visitor (drops duplicate 542-line decoder, debug logs, dead helpers) - Add DisassemblyOptions (terse default = byte-identical legacy; verbose = all enrichments) + CodeAttribute.prettyPrintCode(options) - Verbose: resolved invokedynamic + bootstrap, line numbers, local names/types, stack-frame markers, exception table with resolved catch types - Centralize CP-reference resolution in ConstPoolFormat - Fix invokedynamic/invokeinterface resolution (were mislabeled/UnknownReference) - Fix latent bugs: empty InvokeStaticInstruction.accept(), JSR_W crash, NewArray bad-atype crash, wide loads mis-modeled as ILoadInstruction, UnknownInstruction zero-fill write() corruption, getLength()/factory log spam - Update docs
- Fixed signing of conditional branches, jsr, and sipush in bytecode printer
- Fixed signing of conditional branches, jsr, and sipush in bytecode printer

Stamp bytecode offset onto SSA IR instructions during lifting - InstructionTranslator records each emitted instruction's originating bytecode offset, enabling data-flow provenance back to source bytecode

Fix decompiler call/array reconstruction - Don't materialize single-use call results (fixes orphaned re-inlined statements) - Collapse varargs array packing back into individual arguments (materialized + inline forms) - Render varargs method parameters as T... instead of T[] - Fix multidim anewarray: parse array-descriptor element types and emit dimensions in valid order (new int[2][] not new int[][2])
Query API (Migrated over from JStudio)

Add bytecode-offset -> source-line maps to the decompiler - Stamp IR offset provenance onto recovered statements; preserve through AST transforms - New ClassDecompiler.decompileWithLineMap() -> DecompileResult with per-method offset->line maps - Xref now records real bytecode offsets
Add per-method text spans to DecompileResult - ClassDecompiler records each member's exact start/end line (signature through closing brace) alongside the line maps
- Add field and class declaration spans to decompiler
- Map inlined lambda bodies under their own line-map key

Fix recompiler VerifyErrors and decompiler structural recovery
Recompiler (source -> verifiable bytecode): - switch, try/catch frames + exception table, nested try (multi-run table) - long/double increment, try/catch value continuation (SSA), caught-exception type resolution for chained calls
Decompiler structural recovery: - reconstruct synchronized blocks from the monitor pattern - coalesce multi-catch into one clause; drop the redundant outer try - structural finally-gap recovery (handles a return inside finally) - reconstruct String switch from the hashCode/equals two-phase form
Adds RecompileVerifyTest and StructuralRecoveryReconstructionTest.
Add MethodGrafter.replaceMethodBody for in-place body swaps

Resolve reference types in descriptors and qualified static field access
descriptorOf/resolveInternalName apply imports and fix nested $ so descriptors match the originals; recognize a.b.Outer$Inner.CONST as a static field access instead of resolving its owner to Object.
- update docs
- Fix bug where query wasn't considering DynamicSubject condys
- Fixed bytecode printer for nested BSMs
- Query DSL: class type-system predicates, class <-> method composition, param(n).type
- Fixed issue with ClassRenamer erroneously renaming unrelated Utf8 attributes
- updateNameAndTypeName now always repoints to a NameAndType backed by a fresh name Utf8
- LdcInstruction lowering encoding is now derived from cpIndex (narrow ldc =< 255, wide ldc_w > 255) in the constructor, getLength(), and write().
- CopyPropagation replaced both chain-followers with one resolve()

- TypeInference: handle WIDE-prefixed load/store (locals > 255) instead of treating them as frame no-ops - BytecodeLifter: propagate primitive type around phi cycles (long loop var seeded by a const was mis-typed int) - BytecodeLifter/BytecodeEmitter: emit the caught-exception astore at handler entry; mark it via the real exception value (SSA IR unchanged) - BytecodeLifter: populate ExceptionHandler.tryBlocks so the regenerated table no longer spans the handler - Fix two tests that codified the old bugs (testWide, removeMethodCall)

Fix unresolved class constants in .class literals, casts, and instanceof
lowerClass/lowerCast/lowerInstanceOf emitted bare simple names (e.g. Main instead of osrs/dev/Main) for same-package/imported types, causing NoClassDefFoundError at runtime. Resolve the type name through the TypeResolver via a shared helper. Adds ClassLiteralResolutionTest.
- Fix recompile fidelity: qualified class constants + JDK return types
- BinaryOpInstruction.swapOperands
- Renamer ordering fix
- Fix decompile->recompile fidelity: qualified names + return types
- Fix decompile->recompile fidelity: qualified names + return types for wildcard imports
- CodeWriter::removeInstruction
- ASTLowerer ordering fix

Fix decompile→recompile type fidelity
Resolve ctor/method/field/array/generic types via TypeResolver, not raw AST types (fixes Frame NoClassDefFound + more); emit acmp for reference ==/!=; run structured finally bodies. Add recompile-verify sweep test.
Fix decompile→recompile type fidelity
- Abstract Execution API

Fix decompile -> recompile fidelity for constructors and boolean conditions - BytecodeEmitter: emit the idiomatic new;dup;args;invokespecial for constructor calls (storing the result to a local), so new X(args) round-trips instead of spilling and decompiling back to new X() with dropped args - ExpressionLowerer: lower !, && and || in conditions as direct branches rather than materializing them into a 0/1 value over a temp local (which decompiled to `cond ? local : local`) - Add round-trip regression tests

The BIG one - Refactored the gigantic MAMMOTH of a monolithic module into multiple submodules for project health.
# Breaking Changes
Package Renames: - com.tonic.utill -> com.tonic.util - com.tonic.parser.attribute.anotation -> com.tonic.parser.attribute.annotation
Class Relocations: - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.Visitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.Visitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractClassVisitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.AbstractClassVisitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractMethodVisitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.AbstractMethodVisitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractBlockVisitor -> com.tonic.analysis.ssa.visitor.AbstractBlockVisitor
Method Relocations: - ClassFile.generateGetter(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.generateGetter(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.generateSetter(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.generateSetter(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.setFieldInitialValue(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.setFieldInitialValue(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.computeFrames(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.computeFrames(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.createNewMethod(boolean addDefaultBody, ...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.createMethodWithBody(classFile, ...) - ClassPool.createNewClass(...) (auto ctor/clinit) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.createClass(pool, ...) (now bare without it) - CodeAttribute.prettyPrintCode([opts]) -> com.tonic.analysis.CodePrinter.prettyPrintCode(codeAttr[, opts]) - CodeWriter.toSSA()/fromSSA(ir)/optimizeSSA() -> com.tonic.analysis.ssa.SSABridge.toSSA(cw)/fromSSA(cw, ir)/optimizeSSA(cw) - BootstrapMethodInfo.isStringConcat/isLambda/isRecord/isSwitch(...) + the LAMBDA_METAFACTORY/STRING_CONCAT_FACTORY/OBJECT_METHODS/SWITCH_BOOTSTRAPS constants -> com.tonic.analysis.BootstrapFamilies.*

The BIG one - Refactored the gigantic MAMMOTH of a monolithic module into multiple submodules for project health.
# Breaking Changes
Package Renames: - com.tonic.utill -> com.tonic.util - com.tonic.parser.attribute.anotation -> com.tonic.parser.attribute.annotation
Class Relocations: - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.Visitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.Visitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractClassVisitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.AbstractClassVisitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractMethodVisitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.AbstractMethodVisitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractBlockVisitor -> com.tonic.analysis.ssa.visitor.AbstractBlockVisitor
Method Relocations: - ClassFile.generateGetter(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.generateGetter(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.generateSetter(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.generateSetter(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.setFieldInitialValue(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.setFieldInitialValue(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.computeFrames(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.computeFrames(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.createNewMethod(boolean addDefaultBody, ...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.createMethodWithBody(classFile, ...) - ClassPool.createNewClass(...) (auto ctor/clinit) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.createClass(pool, ...) (now bare without it) - CodeAttribute.prettyPrintCode([opts]) -> com.tonic.analysis.CodePrinter.prettyPrintCode(codeAttr[, opts]) - CodeWriter.toSSA()/fromSSA(ir)/optimizeSSA() -> com.tonic.analysis.ssa.SSABridge.toSSA(cw)/fromSSA(cw, ir)/optimizeSSA(cw) - BootstrapMethodInfo.isStringConcat/isLambda/isRecord/isSwitch(...) + the LAMBDA_METAFACTORY/STRING_CONCAT_FACTORY/OBJECT_METHODS/SWITCH_BOOTSTRAPS constants -> com.tonic.analysis.BootstrapFamilies.*

MESSAGE.value: Add MethodGrafter.replaceMethodBody for in-place body swaps

Resolve reference types in descriptors and qualified static field access
descriptorOf/resolveInternalName apply imports and fix nested $ so descriptors match the originals; recognize a.b.Outer$Inner.CONST as a static field access instead of resolving its owner to Object.
- update docs
- Fix bug where query wasn't considering DynamicSubject condys
- Fixed bytecode printer for nested BSMs
- Query DSL: class type-system predicates, class <-> method composition, param(n).type
- Fixed issue with ClassRenamer erroneously renaming unrelated Utf8 attributes
- updateNameAndTypeName now always repoints to a NameAndType backed by a fresh name Utf8
- LdcInstruction lowering encoding is now derived from cpIndex (narrow ldc =< 255, wide ldc_w > 255) in the constructor, getLength(), and write().
- CopyPropagation replaced both chain-followers with one resolve()

- TypeInference: handle WIDE-prefixed load/store (locals > 255) instead of treating them as frame no-ops - BytecodeLifter: propagate primitive type around phi cycles (long loop var seeded by a const was mis-typed int) - BytecodeLifter/BytecodeEmitter: emit the caught-exception astore at handler entry; mark it via the real exception value (SSA IR unchanged) - BytecodeLifter: populate ExceptionHandler.tryBlocks so the regenerated table no longer spans the handler - Fix two tests that codified the old bugs (testWide, removeMethodCall)

Fix unresolved class constants in .class literals, casts, and instanceof
lowerClass/lowerCast/lowerInstanceOf emitted bare simple names (e.g. Main instead of osrs/dev/Main) for same-package/imported types, causing NoClassDefFoundError at runtime. Resolve the type name through the TypeResolver via a shared helper. Adds ClassLiteralResolutionTest.
- Fix recompile fidelity: qualified class constants + JDK return types
- BinaryOpInstruction.swapOperands
- Renamer ordering fix
- Fix decompile->recompile fidelity: qualified names + return types
- Fix decompile->recompile fidelity: qualified names + return types for wildcard imports
- CodeWriter::removeInstruction
- ASTLowerer ordering fix

Fix decompile→recompile type fidelity
Resolve ctor/method/field/array/generic types via TypeResolver, not raw AST types (fixes Frame NoClassDefFound + more); emit acmp for reference ==/!=; run structured finally bodies. Add recompile-verify sweep test.
Fix decompile→recompile type fidelity
- Abstract Execution API

Fix decompile -> recompile fidelity for constructors and boolean conditions - BytecodeEmitter: emit the idiomatic new;dup;args;invokespecial for constructor calls (storing the result to a local), so new X(args) round-trips instead of spilling and decompiling back to new X() with dropped args - ExpressionLowerer: lower !, && and || in conditions as direct branches rather than materializing them into a 0/1 value over a temp local (which decompiled to `cond ? local : local`) - Add round-trip regression tests

The BIG one - Refactored the gigantic MAMMOTH of a monolithic module into multiple submodules for project health.
# Breaking Changes
Package Renames: - com.tonic.utill -> com.tonic.util - com.tonic.parser.attribute.anotation -> com.tonic.parser.attribute.annotation
Class Relocations: - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.Visitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.Visitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractClassVisitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.AbstractClassVisitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractMethodVisitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.AbstractMethodVisitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractBlockVisitor -> com.tonic.analysis.ssa.visitor.AbstractBlockVisitor
Method Relocations: - ClassFile.generateGetter(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.generateGetter(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.generateSetter(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.generateSetter(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.setFieldInitialValue(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.setFieldInitialValue(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.computeFrames(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.computeFrames(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.createNewMethod(boolean addDefaultBody, ...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.createMethodWithBody(classFile, ...) - ClassPool.createNewClass(...) (auto ctor/clinit) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.createClass(pool, ...) (now bare without it) - CodeAttribute.prettyPrintCode([opts]) -> com.tonic.analysis.CodePrinter.prettyPrintCode(codeAttr[, opts]) - CodeWriter.toSSA()/fromSSA(ir)/optimizeSSA() -> com.tonic.analysis.ssa.SSABridge.toSSA(cw)/fromSSA(cw, ir)/optimizeSSA(cw) - BootstrapMethodInfo.isStringConcat/isLambda/isRecord/isSwitch(...) + the LAMBDA_METAFACTORY/STRING_CONCAT_FACTORY/OBJECT_METHODS/SWITCH_BOOTSTRAPS constants -> com.tonic.analysis.BootstrapFamilies.*

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
The BIG one - Refactored the gigantic MAMMOTH of a monolithic module into multiple submodules for project health.
# Breaking Changes
Package Renames: - com.tonic.utill -> com.tonic.util - com.tonic.parser.attribute.anotation -> com.tonic.parser.attribute.annotation
Class Relocations: - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.Visitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.Visitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractClassVisitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.AbstractClassVisitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractMethodVisitor -> com.tonic.parser.visitor.AbstractMethodVisitor - com.tonic.analysis.visitor.AbstractBlockVisitor -> com.tonic.analysis.ssa.visitor.AbstractBlockVisitor
Method Relocations: - ClassFile.generateGetter(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.generateGetter(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.generateSetter(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.generateSetter(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.setFieldInitialValue(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.setFieldInitialValue(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.computeFrames(...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.computeFrames(classFile, ...) - ClassFile.createNewMethod(boolean addDefaultBody, ...) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.createMethodWithBody(classFile, ...) - ClassPool.createNewClass(...) (auto ctor/clinit) -> com.tonic.analysis.ClassFactory.createClass(pool, ...) (now bare without it) - CodeAttribute.prettyPrintCode([opts]) -> com.tonic.analysis.CodePrinter.prettyPrintCode(codeAttr[, opts]) - CodeWriter.toSSA()/fromSSA(ir)/optimizeSSA() -> com.tonic.analysis.ssa.SSABridge.toSSA(cw)/fromSSA(cw, ir)/optimizeSSA(cw) - BootstrapMethodInfo.isStringConcat/isLambda/isRecord/isSwitch(...) + the LAMBDA_METAFACTORY/STRING_CONCAT_FACTORY/OBJECT_METHODS/SWITCH_BOOTSTRAPS constants -> com.tonic.analysis.BootstrapFamilies.*
